title: crotalaria pseudonatalitia
intro: Crotalaria pseudonatalitia, also known as the butterfly tree or calabash, is a shrub-like plant native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The leaves and seeds of Crotalaria pseudonatalitia are rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, and is used in herbal remedies to treat a range of health issues.
